'''fagaza''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pycnic|pycnic]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-g-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pycnic|pycnic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| fagaza
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || fægæzæth || fægæzæj || fægæzæsh || fægæzæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || fagagazath || fagagazaj || fagagazash || fagagaza
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || fagazath || fagazaj || fagazash || fagaza
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || fagafzafth || fagafzafj || fagafzafsh || fagafzaf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || fagazatha || fagazaja || fagazasha || fagazaka
|-
| [[Patient]] || fagazath || fagazaj || fagazash || fagaza
|-
| [[Possessive]] || fagazathal || fagazajal || fagazashal || fagazakal
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || fagazaathatha || fagazaajaja || fagazaashasha || fagazaaka
|-
| [[Dative]] || fagazathan || fagazajan || fagazashan || fagazakan
|-
| [[Speaker]] || fagazathaoro || fagazajaoro || fagazashaoro || fagazakaoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
